name: Demon's Blood
developer: Another Slime Studio, Ptits Potes N'Co
short_description: Demon's Blood is a first-person shooter that throws you into a demonic universe. Become a special agent, arm yourself and improve your equipment in different games to repel the demonic forces trying to invade your world.
detailed_description:
You are a follower from a diabolical sect, you made a pact with a demonic force and you must use that new strength to slaughter the various demons trying to take control of the world !

Play solo to test yourself, train or gain some exp to upgrade your weapons or play with a friend by comparing who survives the longest or who has the best score at the end !

We're in a playtests phase right now so we'll listen to most feedbacks to try and improve the game so come and share your thoughts to us so we can build a really good game together.
